subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses and made manifest the clear proofs, and Who hath spoken before the faces of the world through this Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات و نطق امام وجوه العالم بهذا الاسم الذی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution
